creator: ahkdiep@gmail.com
text:
new release

Fix: Index: py-ctags/distinfo
===================================================================
--- py-ctags/distinfo	(revision 186788)
+++ py-ctags/distinfo	(revision 186789)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (python-ctags-1.0.2.tar.gz) = 0c6bf8364e8f30fbc3950e0e845fe93b
-SHA256 (python-ctags-1.0.2.tar.gz) = 84268decd2803ff1a3bc348e9ef80ba802a3148ba75a5deab75d5df90278561a
-SIZE (python-ctags-1.0.2.tar.gz) = 21984
+MD5 (python-ctags-1.0.5.tar.gz) = 6579b49942c73abd1d22a5cfd559856b
+SHA256 (python-ctags-1.0.5.tar.gz) = 47eff614b9cc15333bf9d6ca4b2c068802cde2d9328946ed7a1b5e3369e35fe9
+SIZE (python-ctags-1.0.5.tar.gz) = 24274
Index: py-ctags/Makefile
===================================================================
--- py-ctags/Makefile	(revision 186788)
+++ py-ctags/Makefile	(revision 186789)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	ctags
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -18,6 +18,6 @@
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	python-ctags
-PYDISTUTILS_PKGVERSION=	1.0.2
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGVERSION=	1.0.5
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>



Patch attached with submission follows:
